closure.exact_boundary: All discrete structures generated from finite canonical One/Fold forms, exact positive traces, held selections, pair-cell relations and successor construction.

An extra constructor is not supplied by the Foundation grammar.

The discrete kernel is complete unique canonical collections with retained membership, pair-cell-selected relations, total single-valued maps, held sequence order, One/base-successor induction and no extra constructor.
